title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 161.525 - Fiscal year ending with balance of less than one percent in teachers' and incidental funds — notice requirements
text:
161.525.  Fiscal year ending with balance of less than one percent in teachers' and incidental funds — notice requirements. — If at the end of a fiscal year a school district has a combined balance remaining in its teachers' and incidental funds of less than one percent of the amount expended from the funds during the previous fiscal year, the department of elementary and secondary education shall send a notice advising the board of education and the chief operating officer of the district of such fact.  The department of elementary and secondary education shall send a copy of such notice to the boards of education and chief operating officers of all adjoining school districts.
(L. 1992 S.B. 581 § 3 subsec. 1) 
Effective 4-17-92
